title: Junior Software Developer

personal_info.summary: Computer science student passionate about software development, artificial intelligence, and game development. Experienced with Python programming, web development, and building small technical projects. Interested in developing innovative applications and improving problem-solving skills through real-world projects.

objective: Seeking an opportunity to work as a junior developer where I can apply my programming knowledge, learn modern technologies, and contribute to building impactful software and AI-based solutions.

education.school: Cochin University of Science and Technology

experience.description: Developed responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Assisted in building reusable React components for internal dashboards. Fixed bugs and improved website performance. Collaborated with team using Git and GitHub for version control.
Assisted in creating small gameplay prototypes using Unreal Engine 5. Worked on level design basics and helped test gameplay mechanics.

internships.description: Worked on a small web application using React and Node.js. Assisted senior developers in debugging backend APIs and improving UI components.

projects.title: AI Resume Builder
projects.description: Developed a web application that helps users create professional resumes using templates, AI suggestions, and ATS score analysis.

achievements.title: Best Student Project Award
achievements.description: Received for developing an AI-based resume builder application.

extracurricular.description: Produce instrumental and electronic music using FL Studio and digital instruments.
